children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 10 days after the date on which the budget of the President for each fiscal year is submitted to Congress pursuant to , the Secretary shall submit to the Committees on Transportation and Infrastructure and Appropriations of the House of Representatives and the Committees on Environment and Public Works and Appropriations of the Senate a report on the status of each covered report.section 1105 of title 31

children.label: A
children.text: A summary of the status of each covered report, including if each such report has been initiated.

children.label: i
children.text: have been made available to carry out each such report; and

children.label: ii
children.text: the Secretary requires to complete each such report.

children.label: C
children.text: A detailed assessment of how the Secretary intends to complete each covered report, including an anticipated timeline for completion.

children.heading: Publicly available
children.label: 3 Publicly available
children.text: The Secretary shall make each report required under paragraph (1) publicly available on the website of the Corps of Engineers.

children.heading: Notification of committees
children.label: 4 Notification of committees
children.text: The Secretary shall submit to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives and the Committee on the Environment and Public Works of the Senate on an annual basis a draft of each covered report.

children.label: A
children.text: means any report or study required to be submitted by the Secretary under this Act or any Act providing authorizations for water resources development projects enacted after , to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Environment and Public Works of the Senate that has not been so submitted; andJanuary 4, 2025

children.label: B
children.text: does not include a feasibility study (as such term is defined in ).section 2215(d) of this title
